title: My Star
content:
{{Top|leg}}
"'''My Star'''" was a song commonly sung by [[Catarine Towani]] to her daughter, [[Cindel Towani|Cindel]], during Cindel's early childhood. Following her mother's [[Death/Legends|death]], Cindel sang the song to [[Noa Briqualon]], her new guardian. The lyrics were as follows:

:''My star keeps me company, and leads me through the night.''
:''My star watches over me, and fills my dreams with light.''
:''Some things change, but some things shine forever as they are.''
:''In the sky, shining high... my star.''<ref name="bfe">''[[Ewoks: The Battle for Endor]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The song "My Star" was composed by [[Jeff Moss]] for the [[1985]] made-for-TV film ''[[Ewoks: The Battle for Endor]]'', in which it was performed by the [[Wikipedia:Wales|Welsh]] actress [[Siân Phillips]].<ref name="KenWheat">{{EmailCite|email=Wookieepedia:Email/Ken Wheat|creator=[[Ken Wheat]]|date=2011-08-01}}</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Ewoks: The Battle for Endor]]''
